summary: Live Event page structured signal capture (Phase 5) tested successfully. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All key features verified via Playwright - athlete chips with photos, school chips with target highlighting, 6 signal types, interest selector, LOG SIGNAL workflow, Add School button, and grouped recent signals panel.
critical_code_review_comments: LiveEvent.js correctly implements all 6 signal types: coach_interest, strong_performance, needs_film, offered_visit, good_conversation, standout_skill
Signal type mappings work correctly: coach_interest/offered_visit update pipeline, needs_film/good_conversation/coach_interest create pod actions
Pipeline stage order correctly prevents downgrades (Not Contacted < Prospect < Initial Contact < Engaged < Campus Visit < Offer)
Add School feature creates program with 'Prospect' status and adds timeline entry
Recent signals panel correctly groups by athlete+school with signal count per group
Target school highlighting works when athlete is selected - shows target schools first with visual distinction
Saved indicator and toast notifications provide clear feedback on signal logging with pipeline/action status
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing seed data. event_1 (College Exposure Camp) has athletes: athlete_1 (Emma), athlete_2 (Olivia), athlete_4 (Sarah). Schools: UCLA, Stanford, USC, Virginia, Duke.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 Live Event structured signal capture tested. Page at /events/event_1/live works with all features: (1) 6 Signal Types in grid: Coach Interest (pipeline:Engaged+action), Strong Performance (none), Needs Film (action:Send film), Offered Visit (pipeline:Campus Visit+action), Good Conversation (action:Thank-you), Standout Skill (none). (2) Pipeline Integration: Signal auto-updates program recruiting_status if signal maps to higher stage (stages: Not Contacted < Prospect < Initial Contact < Engaged < Campus Visit < Offer). (3) Auto Pod Routing: needs_film, offered_visit, good_conversation, coach_interest auto-create pod_actions and set routed_to_pod=True. (4) Add School button: appears when athlete selected, creates pipeline entry with Prospect status. (5) Grouped Recent Panel: signals grouped by athlete+school combination. (6) All signals feed timeline via athlete_notes collection. data-testid selectors: live-event-page, athlete-chips, athlete-chip-{id}, school-chips, school-chip-{id}, interest-selector, interest-{value}, signal-types, signal-{value}, note-text, log-signal-btn, clear-form-btn, add-school-btn, add-school-form, add-school-input, add-school-confirm, recent-signals-feed, signal-group-{idx}, recent-signal-{id}, saved-indicator, target-hint.
